markdown.markdown:
I am fascinated by the capacity of collectives to achieve outcomes beyond the reach of isolated individuals. My research investigates the interplay between individual agency and collective dynamics, focusing on how incentives shape this relationship. I draw upon models from cognitive science and computational economics, analysing them through a complex systems framework that incorporates information theory, dynamical systems theory, game theory, and Bayesian inference. Passionate about empowering individuals equitably and sustainably, I believe that democratizing information and technology, along with fostering local communities, will have the greatest impact toward this goal. I have studies in robotics and mechatronics engineering, statistics and data science, complex systems, AI. I have experience in deep reinforcement learning and computer vision research. I'm a certified AWS Solutions Architect Associate with several years of industry experience in cloud infrastructure and 10 years of Python expertise in automation, data engineering, and machine learning.
Jul 2026 Participating in the 2026 [Human-aligned AI Summer School (HAAISS)](https://humanaligned.ai/2026/) Prague, CZ
Jun 2026
Sep 2026		 I will be based in London for the [PIBBSS Fellowship](https://princint.ai/programs/fellowship/) London, UK
Jan 2026 Attended a symposium on the Great Filter Hypothesis, and collaborated on a ["Algorithmic bottlenecks in evolution" preprint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04498) with some participants Heron Island, AU
May 2025 Presented Active Inference x Game Theory work at [AAMAS'25](https://www.ifaamas.org/Proceedings/aamas2025/pdfs/p1793.pdf) Detroit, US
## Selected Publications Sweeney P, **Ruiz-Serra J**, Harré MS. Decision, Inference, and Information: Formal Equivalences Under Active Inference. *Entropy*, 2025. [DOI:10.3390/e28010001](https://doi.org/10.3390/e28010001) **Ruiz-Serra J**, Sweeney P, and Harré MS. Factorised Active Inference for Strategic Multi-Agent Interactions. *AAMAS '25*, Detroit, US, May 2025. [DOI:10.5555/3709347.3743815](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.5555/3709347.3743815) **Ruiz-Serra J**, White J, Petrie S, Kameneva T, and McCarthy C. Learning scene representations for human-assistive displays using self-attention networks. *ACM Trans. Multimedia Comput. Commun. Appl.*, 2024. [DOI:10.1145/3650111](https://doi.org/10.1145/3650111) **Ruiz-Serra J** and Harré MS. Inverse Reinforcement Learning as the Algorithmic Basis for Theory of Mind: Current Methods and Open Problems. *Algorithms*, 2023 (Awarded "Editor's Choice"). [DOI:10.3390/a16020068](https://doi.org/10.3390/a16020068) **Ruiz-Serra J**, White J, Petrie S, Kameneva T, and McCarthy C. Towards self-attention based visual navigation in the real world. *ACRA '22*, Brisbane, AU, Dec 2022. [arXiv:2209.07043](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2209.07043) *More on [Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qkmyBJYAAAAJ)* ## Education
